svg.title: half_arc_terminal_lunar_reference
svg.desc: half_arc_terminal_lunar_reference comparison reference at 800 meter radius with low, mid, and high time-to-go bands.
svg.text: Comparison reference · long-margin low-gravity baseline · gravity = 1.62m/s² (lunar)
Bands are solved from time-to-go. Low is clamped so shallow cells stay descending instead of starting upward.
